channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Diplomatic Talks Between US and Iran Show Signs of Progress
item.description: On Friday, May 22, 2026, international developments between the United States and Iran indicate cautious movement towards diplomatic solutions. US President Donald Trump expressed determination to rec...

item.title: Practical Tips and Products for Enjoying the Early May Bank Holiday
item.description: The early May bank holiday weekend provides the perfect opportunity to embrace warmer weather and enjoy a variety of activities, both at home and outdoors. The Guardian’s guide highlights practical an...

item.title: Editorial calls for firm action and accountability over police violence against demonstrators
item.description: The Daily Nation editorial titled 'Hold police accountable for brutalising protesters' argues that Kenyan security forces must be held to account whenever they use excessive force against demonstrator...

item.title: South African Professor Begins Clinical Trials for 3D-Printed Middle-Ear Implants
item.description: A University of Pretoria professor, Mashudu Tshifularo, has pioneered the world’s first successful middle-ear transplant using 3D-printed titanium bones and is now set to begin clinical trials at Stev...

item.title: How Global Financial Systems Entrench Underdevelopment in Poor Countries
item.description: The article examines how global financial institutions, such as the IMF and World Bank, have contributed to the systematic underdevelopment of poorer countries. While these organisations present loans...

item.title: President Tinubu Denies Plans To Rename Nigeria or Abolish Sharia Law
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don come out clear say e no get any plan to change Nigeria name to 'United States of Nigeria' nor abolish Sharia law for North. Na Bayo Onanuga, Tinubu Special Adviser on Informa...

item.title: TECH Global University Achieves Top Student Ratings Globally
item.description: TECH Global University, the biggest digital university worldwide, has been recognised as the highest-rated university by its students. Platforms like Google Maps and Trustpilot show a consistent score...

item.title: Daily Feng Shui Guidance from Master Hanz Cua for May 22, 2026
item.description: ABS-CBN Lifestyle shares the daily feng shui advice from Master Hanz Cua for May 22, 2026. While the full details of specific predictions are not provided in the article, Master Hanz Cua is known for ...

item.title: Senate Republicans delay votes amid disputes over Trump’s proposed DOJ fund and ballroom project

item.title: Site C Dam in B.C. Named After Former Premier John Horgan
item.description: The Government of British Columbia has officially named the Site C hydroelectric dam on the Peace River near Fort St. John after the late premier, John Horgan. Once a vocal critic of the project, Horg...

item.title: Oluremi Tinubu launches INSPIRE to support women in Nigerian Civil Service
item.description: Nigeria’s First Lady, Oluremi Tinubu, don launch new initiative wey dem call INSPIRE, wey stand for Inclusive Network for Supporting Progressive Leadership, Innovation, Reforms and Equity for Women. D...

item.title: Understanding ARC Raiders Matchmaking: Playstyle, Fairness, and Enjoyment
item.description: The ARC Raiders team has provided a detailed explanation of their matchmaking system, addressing both player concerns and misconceptions. The system is designed to balance fairness and enjoyment, ensu...

item.title: May 27, 2026 Declared National Holiday in Observance of Eid'l Adha
item.description: Malacañang Palace has officially announced that May 27, 2026, which falls on a Wednesday, will be a regular holiday nationwide in observance of Eid'l Adha, also known as the Feast of Sacrifice. This d...

item.title: Ricardo Goss Eyes World Cup Squad Spot as Goalkeeper Competition Heats Up
item.description: Siwelele goalkeeper Ricardo Goss has expressed his ambition to represent South Africa at the upcoming 2026 Fifa World Cup. With Bafana Bafana drawn in Group A alongside Mexico, South Korea, and the Cz...

item.title: US Congress Evaluates Tanzania Relations Amid Electoral and Human Rights Concerns
item.description: The United States Congress is carrying out a careful review of its relationship with Tanzania after concerns about Tanzania’s recent elections and growing human rights issues. Lawmakers are questionin...

item.title: Donald Trump undecided about attending son Donald Jr's wedding
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump has left uncertainty over whether he will attend the upcoming wedding of his son, Donald Trump Jr, in the Bahamas. When questioned about the event, Trump gave a non-co...

item.title: FIFA's 2026 World Cup: High Ticket Prices Drive Record Revenue Amid Criticism Over Spending Priorities
item.description: For the 2026 World Cup, FIFA is set to generate record revenue, potentially exceeding $15 billion, largely due to sharply increased ticket prices and the introduction of dynamic pricing. Category 1 ti...

item.title: Rising Electricity Costs Despite Lower Consumption in South Africa
item.description: South Africans are facing steadily rising electricity costs even as their actual usage declines, according to a recent light paper by residential solar provider GoSolr. The report highlights that the ...

item.title: Ash Moloney switches from decathlon to 400m hurdles while Cedric Dubler continues in athletics
item.description: Ash Moloney, who won a bronze medal in the decathlon at the Tokyo Olympics, has taken a bold step by leaving the 10-discipline event to focus on the 400m hurdles. The 26-year-old made the switch due t...
